name: io.github.jyswee/ainpc-cli
description: AI NPCs with persistent memory for game studios. 49 tools: NPC CRUD, dialogue, events, persona generation. Stdio or remote SSE.

environmentVariables.name: AINPC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AINPCEngine API key (npk_...). Get one with `ainpc signup` — 7-day free trial.

environmentVariables.name: AINPC_GAME_ID
environmentVariables.description: Game slug to scope NPC tools to.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using your AINPCEngine API key: 'Bearer npk_...'. Optional: without one the server starts in onboarding mode and can self-signup via the ainpc_signup tool.
